untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit implied volatility (IV) indicator which is not in the allowed indicators list. India VIX and historical volatility (hvol_20) are used as proxies, but this is a lossy approximation. True IV vs HV comparison requires options market data (IV surface, term structure) not available in price/technical indicator set. Threshold definition marked AUTHOR_SILENT in original — no specific IV undervaluation/overvaluation levels provided.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy translation using hvol_20 (20-bar historical volatility) vs india_vix (volatility index). However, this does not capture the true implied volatility from options market. The signal is fundamentally an options strategy requiring IV data from option chains, which cannot be properly expressed with price-based indicators alone. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original specification.
